user.name: Grayson Dodson
user.description: Founder of https://t.co/CEMRXCxAOr. Building practical AI tools, business systems, and technical workflows for all people! Opinions are my own.

tweets.text:
A coding agent's biggest risk isn't being wrong. It's being confidently wrong.
Left to defaults, it commits to the first viable solution and writes toward it — and you don't catch the bad assumption until you're deep in the implementation.
The fix lives in how you frame the task.
tweets.name: Grayson Dodson

tweets.text: If you've ever shipped an AI workflow that felt fine in testing and then got slow, expensive, or flaky once a team actually used it — this shows you why. You watch the request budget get eaten by instructions, context, examples, tool output, and retries before the model even https://t.co/8QbbuG45T4
tweets.name: Grayson Dodson
